name: He’s Milking You Dry

FYI (info for the intro)

This below is a “cattle crush” - a humane device used to restrain cattle, usually for medical attention. The “head gate” is the front part that closes around the neck (the blue and white striped bit), it doesn’t hurt them, and often has a calming effect as cows like to be squeezed like a big hug.
